title: CMA working visit
description: LEFT TO RIGHT: Director Registration, Exchanges, Market Infrastructure and Innovations Securities and Exchange Commission, Mr. Abbas Abdulkadir, Chief Executive Capital Market Authority Kenya, Mr. Wyc
html: LEFT TO RIGHT: Director Registration, Exchanges, Market Infrastructure and Innovations Securities and Exchange Commission, Mr. Abbas Abdulkadir, Chief Executive Capital Market Authority Kenya, Mr. Wyckliffe Shamiah Director General SEC Mr. Lamido Yuguda, Director Strategy Securities and Exchange Commission Dr Mo’ Omamegbe and Director DG’S Office SEC, Mr. Daiyabu Kurfi during a Working visit by the SEC team to the CMA in Kenya, recently.
